recommendations.rationale: Exact repetition catches cheap deterministic loops, while the progress fingerprint and recovery recurrence test control false positives.

recommendations.rec: Add effect_prepared, effect_dispatched, effect_result, effect_unknown, effect_reconciled, and effect_compensated event schemas. Require stable effectId/logicalBranchId/idempotencyKey, changing attemptId, request and response hashes, provider receipt, verification status, and prevEventHash. Flush effect_prepared before invoking any side-effecting adapter.
recommendations.rationale: This closes the current dispatch-to-JSONL ambiguity without pretending an external effect and local append can be atomic. The unavoidable crash window becomes an explicit recoverable state.

recommendations.rec: Implement a replay planner that folds receipts into reuse, reconcile, re-execute, compensate, or block. Adapter capabilities must declare supportsIdempotencyKey, supportsReceiptLookup, compensationOperation, and unknownEffectPolicy; never automatically retry an unknown irreversible effect.
recommendations.rationale: Retry safety varies by adapter. Central capability-driven planning prevents fan-out scripts and individual modes from making inconsistent or unsafe replay decisions.

recommendations.rec: Create a versioned replay-compatibility registry. Compute a canonical fingerprint from logical operation ID, input/output schema hashes, adapter version, reducer version, result codec, and replay policy; allow exact, compatible, migrate, pin-old-runtime, and blocked outcomes. Persist the chosen recovery decision as a new immutable event.
recommendations.rationale: A code hash is too strict for harmless changes and too weak for reordered semantic operations. Explicit compatibility makes old JSONL histories auditable and prevents silent reuse under a changed contract.

recommendations.rec: Add runtime/lib/council/effective-independence.cjs plus append-only judge_observation and independence_snapshot JSONL events. Record blinded judge ID, family/prompt/context/tool hashes, target hash, raw score vector, confidence, gold or verified outcome, error, cost, pairwise Q/phi/double-fault, weighted N_eff, and cross-validated marginal log-loss gain. Start in shadow mode; after at least 100 calibrated targets, block convergence when N_eff<1.5 or no additional seat has positive marginal gain.
recommendations.rationale: This converts seat diversity from a declared prompt property into a replayable empirical gauge and stops three correlated votes from satisfying a nominal quorum.

recommendations.rec: Refactor council execution into target_freeze -> generator fan-out -> provenance blinding -> detector fan-out -> scorer-only adjudication -> deterministic robust aggregation. Enforce capability schemas: generators cannot score, detectors cannot revise or rank, scorers cannot see generator identity/rationale/peer scores, orchestrators cannot author semantic outputs, and target mutation always creates a new targetVersion.
recommendations.rationale: Hard information-flow boundaries address self-preference, position leakage, correlated cross-critique, and the current tendency for adjudication and synthesis to collapse into one model context.

recommendations.rec: Apply the same five-role schema to deep-alignment: immutable artifact target; adapter-owned discovery only; blinded detector findings; scorer severity based on frozen authority plus live re-probe receipts; optional remediation generator only after audit close. A remediation candidate receives a new targetVersion and must be rescored in a fresh execution. Use confusion-matrix competence weights, but retain residual-correlation and raw-score gauges outside Dawid-Skene.
recommendations.rationale: It preserves alignment's verify-first/read-only contract while preventing discovery, detection, remediation, and pass/fail scoring from validating one another inside the same context.

recommendations.rec: Add a versioned fan-in policy evaluator that appends WAIT, ACCEPT, WIDEN, or BLOCK events and makes fanout-merge require an ACCEPT receipt containing the exact selected logical branch IDs.
recommendations.rationale: This prevents merge from silently treating missing registries as success and makes partial acceptance replayable and auditable.

recommendations.rec: Introduce immutable branch_key and logical_branch_id fields, separate attempt IDs from branch identity, and evaluate final policies only at stage, deadline, budget, or impossibility barriers.
recommendations.rationale: Labels, replica ordinals, and completion order are not durable identities; barriered evaluation makes selection invariant to worker timing.

recommendations.rec: Activate the dormant wave model as canonical seed and dissent stages: reserve only seed cost initially, run cheap agreement and evidence checks, then atomically reserve and enqueue the next stage on WIDEN.
recommendations.rationale: This implements skip-on-agreement and widen-on-disagreement without paying worst-case cost up front.

recommendations.rec: Add a versioned Eval-DAG policy with hard, weighted-soft and judge nodes; schedule nodes topologically by cost and append an immutable receipt for every verdict while retaining raw component scores.
recommendations.rationale: This provides actual cheap-check short-circuiting, prevents weighted scores or judges from hiding invariant failures, and makes every aggregate replayable.

recommendations.rec: Make candidate promotion require a fingerprint-matched verification bundle containing original-reproducer, target-fix, impacted-regression and risk-selected full-gate receipts; timeout, flakiness or missing evidence yields UNVERIFIED.
recommendations.rationale: A repair is only established by rerunning the failing behavior and proving a baseline delta; a generated patch or exhausted retry loop is not evidence.

recommendations.rec: Expose deterministic-reject rate, judge-escalation rate, judge cost per promoted candidate, stale-receipt count, flaky-unknown count and regression delta as stream-fold gauges.
recommendations.rationale: These gauges reveal whether the cascade is saving judge cost without silently increasing unverified promotions or regression escapes.

recommendations.rec: Add semantic-community-projection.ts behind coverage-graph-signals.ts. It should consume active claim versions, produce deterministic hierarchical snapshots, remap stable community IDs, and append raw coverageGain, communityBirthGain, resolutionGain, duplicatePenalty and per-community divergencePressure before deriving compatibility newInfoRatio.
recommendations.rationale: The existing graph signal corroborates an agent scalar but cannot distinguish repeated claims, new semantic territory, partition churn or contradiction obligations.

recommendations.rec: Extend JSONL with claim_asserted.v1, contradiction_detected.v1, contradiction_resolved.v1, claim_validity_closed.v1 and community_snapshot.v1. Update continuity-thread.cjs to carry lastAppliedSeq, activeClaimVersionIds, openContradictionIds, communitySnapshotId and projectionFingerprint.
recommendations.rationale: Resume must reconstruct what was believed at a specific runtime sequence without deleting old evidence or flattening unresolved contradictions into current truth.

recommendations.rec: Change deep-research next-focus selection from prose-only Next Focus to an auditable argmax over per-community divergencePressure, with visit cooldown, expected-cost normalization and a critical-contradiction obligation queue. Recluster only after configured graph-drift thresholds; otherwise use provisional assignments.
recommendations.rationale: This turns semantic-community state into deliberate within-thread broadening while controlling recomputation cost and preventing oscillation between the same communities.

recommendations.rec: Add runtime/lib/deep-loop/gauge-fold.ts and a transactional gauge-store backed by SQLite/WAL. Persist per-plane byte cursors, inode and prefix fingerprints, seen event IDs, keyed entity state, and materialized gauges in one transaction; projection fingerprint changes must emit rebuild_required.
recommendations.rationale: The live heartbeat and reducer paths currently rescan complete JSONL and iteration history, so the documented delta-refresh claim is not implemented.

recommendations.rec: Version the observability envelope to v2 with deterministic event IDs, producer sequence, logical branch ID, plane, causal links, receipt references, and immutable judgment_attached and judgment_superseded events.
recommendations.rationale: Stable replay and late evaluation require durable correlation and explicit revisions; random UUIDs and mutable annotation upserts cannot establish deterministic projections.

recommendations.rec: Ship a typed gauge catalog with exact transition tests: branches_in_flight, judgments_pending, judgment_coverage, unresolved_contradictions, semantic_without_receipt, unlinked_observed_effects, receipt_completion_rate, current_score_mean, and append-only latency p50/p95/p99. Compare every incremental projection against a clean full replay in fixtures and sampled completion audits.
recommendations.rationale: Typed algebra prevents double-decrement, stale-score, and non-retractable-sketch errors while the full-replay oracle detects projection drift.

recommendations.rec: Create runtime/budget-cost with BudgetPolicy, BudgetLease, UsageEstimate, and UsageReceipt types. Policies carry budget_id, parent_budget_id, resource dimension, soft and hard limits, window kind, action, and policy fingerprint. Implement reserve(), settle(), cancel(), and project() so one locked reservation charges every applicable ancestor atomically.
recommendations.rationale: This unifies currently fragmented timeout, retry, quota-pool, council, and fan-out caps while bounding concurrent overshoot through reservations rather than delayed accounting.

recommendations.rec: Require fanout-pool to obtain a lease before every spawn and retry. Use scope paths session/mode/lineage/iteration/attempt, charge retries separately, and map hard exhaustion to explicit strict, quorum, deadline, or progressive fan-in behavior instead of generic rejection.
recommendations.rationale: Pre-dispatch leasing makes the parent bound cover retries, parallel attempts, handoffs, and fallback routes while preserving deterministic logical branch IDs.

recommendations.rec: Append budget_reserved, budget_settled, budget_released, budget_soft_exhausted, budget_hard_exhausted, budget_reset, budget_granted, and budget_compensated JSONL events. Fold them into per-resource and per-window gauges, retaining policy version, lease ID, scope path, estimate, receipt, and reset_at.
recommendations.rationale: Explicit events make exhaustion resumable and replayable, allow judgments and cost corrections to attach later, and let incremental gauges be differential-tested against full replay.

recommendations.rec: Add a shadow-only evaluateValueOfComputationCertificate path to runtime/scripts/convergence.cjs. Emit stateFingerprint, policy/evaluator versions, STOP and continuation confidence bounds, delta, epsilon, typed costs, effective sample count, assumptions, and STOP_ELIGIBLE|CONTINUE|INDETERMINATE; keep existing legal-stop gates authoritative until replay calibration passes.
recommendations.rationale: This introduces a principled continuation-value signal without allowing an initially uncalibrated model to terminate live loops.

recommendations.rec: Extend runtime/fan-out-fan-in to allocate rollout samples by logical branch ID using fixed-confidence elimination, with STOP as an arm; count all retry, salvage, handoff, and tool re-entry attempts in one global stopping clock and expose an empirical stopping-tail gauge.
recommendations.rationale: Best-arm allocation reduces wasted leaves, while a path-covering tail bound closes the gap left by per-attempt iteration caps.

recommendations.rec: Add a central durable-effect gateway emitting step_planned, effect_started, effect_receipt, and step_committed events. Require each operation to declare pure-rerunnable, idempotent, queryable, compensatable, or non-idempotent-unqueryable recovery policy.
recommendations.rationale: This preserves exact accepted LLM outputs while making the only unsafe crash window explicit and recoverable without pretending all retries are equivalent.

recommendations.rec: Make fanout-merge.cjs the sole canonical JSONL writer. Leaves write immutable branch receipts; merge commits only after checking generation, fencingEpoch, logicalBranchId, stepKey, and previousTailHash. Route expired started-without-receipt attempts through fanout-salvage.cjs.
recommendations.rationale: Single-writer linearization gives exactly-once logical commits while preserving concurrent execution and preventing stale workers from committing after lock recovery.

recommendations.rec: Add crash-injection replay tests at every boundary: before effect start, after remote acceptance, after receipt append, after fsync, and before logical commit. Assert zero duplicate commits, explicit ambiguous_effect states, and fingerprint rejection after prompt/model/tool-schema changes.
recommendations.rationale: Normal replay tests cannot expose the response-loss window; boundary fault injection verifies the claimed guarantee rather than only successful checkpoint restoration.

recommendations.rec: Add an append-only adaptive_compute_decision event containing logicalBranchId, phase, calibrated support and opposition mass, disagreement, predicted success, controllerVersion, action, typed budget delta, and replay fingerprint. Support stop_accept, sample_peer, deepen_verifier, escalate_model, hotswap, and abandon_with_receipt.
recommendations.rationale: This converts fixed fan-out and binary stop decisions into replayable compute allocation while preserving R1 path coverage, R2 receipts, and R8 typed budgets.

recommendations.rec: Implement a three-tier verification ladder: deterministic tests and schema checks, lightweight calibrated scorer, then generative process verifier. Persist every raw score before reduction and require verifier escalation only for uncertainty-band or high-impact cases.
recommendations.rationale: It combines R5 cheap-first checking with newer verifier-time scaling without paying generative-judge cost on obvious passes or failures.

recommendations.rec: Run controller learning in shadow mode over complete paired replays: log the action a learned controller would take, compare it with the live policy, and promote only versioned policies that pass quality-cost Pareto and replay-determinism gates.
recommendations.rationale: TTRL-style pseudo-rewards can improve allocation without allowing within-lineage online updates to invalidate deterministic replay or reinforce correlated council errors.

recommendations.rec: Add a blinded pairwise adjudicator that emits candidate_blinded, pairwise_judgment, bias_audit, adjudication_inconsistent, and adjudication_decision JSONL events; use deterministic shuffling, reversed-order comparisons, bounded structured briefs, and abstention on inconsistency.
recommendations.rationale: This closes the current position, verbosity, and bandwagon-bias gap while preserving raw proposals and immutable audit history.

recommendations.rec: Replace two-of-three as the final rule with a protocol router: objective evidence gate first, blinded swapped pairwise judging second, detector-guided revision on bias flags, bounded debate only for unresolved high-value uncertainty, and constitutional vetoes for frozen hard constraints.
recommendations.rationale: Different disagreements require different evidence; a single popularity rule conflates correctness, persuasion, presentation, and policy compliance.

recommendations.rec: Create a versioned judge-profile registry calibrated offline with human-preference and verifiable-correctness fixtures; store Brier score, domain accuracy, swap consistency, bias coefficients, effective sample size, and compatibility fingerprints, then use posterior best-candidate probability plus expected regret as the council stop signal.
recommendations.rationale: Reliability weighting is useful only when derived from enough calibration evidence and invalidated whenever model, prompt, rubric, or schema changes.

recommendations.rec: Replace fixed two-of-three dispatch with a sequential seat router maximizing expected calibrated loss reduction per cost minus residual-correlation redundancy; dispatch an executable or human verifier when remaining LLM seats are redundant.
recommendations.rationale: It spends budget only on marginal evidence and prevents nominally heterogeneous but behaviorally correlated seats from manufacturing confidence.

recommendations.rec: Create a versioned seat-calibration registry keyed by model version, prompt hash, rubric, domain, and tool schema; store selective-risk curves, Brier/ECE, residual vectors, bias coefficients, cost, latency, and transport-support bounds.
recommendations.rationale: Judge reliability is conditional, and stale or out-of-support calibration should cause abstention rather than an equal vote.

recommendations.rec: Add immutable JSONL events seat_profile_calibrated, seat_selected, seat_judgment_attached, and council_stopped, including all candidate utilities and the calibration fingerprint used for each adaptive decision.
recommendations.rationale: This makes adaptive selection deterministic under replay, preserves raw judgments, and enables later comparison of fixed, learned, and oracle seat policies on identical trajectories.

recommendations.rec: Add convergence_candidate, verification_pending, converged, degeneration_detected, and quarantined_inconclusive events. Require a health-witness reducer over held-out quality, invariance probes, objective drift, semantic-community survival, and council independence before converged is legal.
recommendations.rationale: This prevents low novelty or high agreement from laundering semantic collapse into successful convergence and provides replay-safe fail-closed terminal states.

recommendations.rec: Emit immutable per-round council_stance and stance_flip events, then derive flip_to_majority_rate, flip_to_evidence_rate, pairwise influence, influence concentration, and effective independent seats. Block agreement-based STOP when independence falls below a calibration-derived threshold.
recommendations.rationale: Agreement caused by one influential or sycophantic seat is not independent corroboration; direction-aware flips distinguish correction from conformity.

recommendations.rec: Insert a cheap metamorphic gate before generative judging: rerun deterministic checks under candidate-label permutations, evidence-order changes, identifier renaming, and equivalent tool-result transforms; after candidate selection, require frozen cross-domain alignment canaries before promotion.
recommendations.rationale: The first stage detects verifier gaming cheaply; the second detects narrow improvements that produce broad objective drift.

recommendations.rec: Add a transition-authorization kernel before the JSONL append boundary. Require transition_proposed followed by transition_authorized or transition_denied carrying actor_role, policy_version, projection_hash, health_state, budget_snapshot, receipt_refs, decision_id, and reasons. Encode the transition system in Quint and model-check at least: no effect without a receipt, deterministic replay, quarantine cannot self-clear, recovery authority is external to the quarantined lineage, and every bounded retry path eventually terminates or escalates.
recommendations.rationale: This closes the self-judging-recovery gap while making R2 and R8 enforceable rather than documentary. Cedar supplies fast policy admission and schema validation; Quint covers temporal properties Cedar cannot prove.

recommendations.rec: Introduce an adjudication_broker that chooses among accept, abstain, add_judge, execute_evidence, bounded_debate, and human_escalation using estimated downstream-loss reduction minus typed cost. Persist context, candidate actions, chosen action, selection propensity, policy version, and delayed outcome on every decision. Evaluate replacements with IPS and doubly-robust estimators, but fail closed to the fixed council when support or effective-sample diagnostics are inadequate.
recommendations.rationale: This operationalizes the unresolved value-of-information question and prevents adaptive council selection from becoming an unmeasurable source of bias.

recommendations.rec: Build a read-only loop_health_witness plus a causal degeneration benchmark. Stream raw gauges through change detectors, append immutable health_alarm attachments, and inject proxy capture, semantic collapse, conformity cascades, verifier corruption, and objective drift into replayed trajectories. Use precommitted recovery rules: single statistical alarm requests evidence; alarm plus mechanistic invariant failure quarantines; receipt or state-integrity violation quarantines immediately; only the transition kernel can authorize rollback, branch, seat rotation, verifier rotation, or human escalation.
recommendations.rationale: Aggregate convergence gauges can remain stable during causal degeneration. Independent detection plus injected-mechanism tests prevents the failing loop from grading and repairing itself.

Cross-iteration shared state for parallel research leaves
Bias-free reduction of heterogeneous multi-model leaves
R7 incremental stream-fold gauges + immutable observability
Open gap: RL convergence theory to loop termination
Open gap: durable-execution guarantees under LLM nondeterminism

Loop failure taxonomy + degeneration vs convergence
nextAngleSuggestions: Version-aware executor capability negotiation: probe and cache codex --help/config-schema so unsupported effort and search combinations fail before fan-out.
Per-leaf live-tool accounting: determine whether codex exec --json or app-server events expose search-call counts that can feed hierarchical tool budgets.
Capability-preserving resume: specify whether a resumed leaf must pin the original CLI binary/version or may migrate through an explicit replay-compatibility event.

Capability-aware matrix compilation: probe and cache each executor's model, structured-output, live-tool, usage-event, and reasoning controls, then deterministically reject or reroute incompatible matrix cells.
Provider event algebra: map Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode/LUNA/SOL/GLM streams into common tool-start, tool-end, usage, artifact, retry, and terminal events suitable for incremental gauges.
Manifest-evolution resume: define when a logical leaf can reuse its receipt after model alias, CLI version, prompt contract, or branch topology changes, and when migration requires re-execution.

Topology benchmark: compare same-model replicas, model-per-branch specialization, full model-by-branch cross-products, and isolated-then-peer-review using novelty, contradiction retention, cost, and tail latency.
Benchmark snapshot-only, exact-CAS-plus-watch, and per-leaf-shard-plus-progressive-fold modes under controlled duplicate rates, leaf counts, crashes, and tail-latency budgets.
Investigate deterministic semantic-index behavior across concurrent insertion order, embedding-model upgrades, approximate-neighbor candidate loss, and replay-compatible projection fingerprints.
Specify compaction and garbage-collection rules: when a finalized snapshot can replace old shard prefixes without breaking receipt replay, contradiction history, or resumed leaves.
Define partial-failure finalization semantics for observedRevision versus finalizedRevision under strict, quorum, deadline, and progressive fan-in policies.
Build a replay-compatibility lattice and fixture matrix for prompt-schema changes, resolved model aliases, CLI upgrades, tool-capability changes, and branch-topology changes.
Crash-test strict, quorum, deadline, and progressive fan-in at every boundary between leaf commit, receipt append, admission freeze, artifact read, and merge-finalized append.
Study orphaned side-effect handling: idempotency-key receipts, compensation handles, and the exact transition from reexecute to compensate-or-block.
Benchmark journal-per-leaf versus one shared JSONL ledger under high completion concurrency, duplicate terminal events, torn appends, and manifest compaction.
Build a permutation-invariance fixture suite for constrained semantic clustering: vary leaf insertion order, embedding batch order, equivalent-chain topology, and contradictory endpoints.
Benchmark exact cosine candidate generation against ANN under realistic 3-32 leaf runs, measuring candidate recall specifically for minority-model singleton findings.
Design the calibration dataset and hierarchical shrinkage rule for sparse model-by-task strata, including alias upgrades and models with no adjudicated history.
Reconstruct the exact phase-001 executor, resolved-model, prompt, and --search receipts, then define which missing fields make automated replay incompatible rather than approximate.

Construct a typed transition manifest for system-deep-loop and run SCC analysis to identify every retry, handoff, callback, tool-reentry, salvage, and merge cycle that currently lacks a root-lease debit or terminal exit.

Replay historical JSONL trajectories to calibrate semantic epsilon, patience, repetition periods, and recovery limits separately for deep-research, deep-review, deep-ai-council, deep-improvement, and deep-alignment.
Design crash-consistent lease debit, commit, refund, and orphan-block semantics around side-effecting tools so a crash cannot either double-spend budget or silently abandon an uncertain effect.
Benchmark judge-on-candidate against every-round judging using both operational tokens and evaluation tokens, while measuring false convergence and intentional-repetition false positives.
